failure.error_msg: Expected balance 200, got 250 assert 250 == 200 + where 250 = int(LogicArray('11111010', Range(7, 'downto', 0))) + where LogicArray('11111010', Range(7, 'downto', 0)) = LogicArrayObject(atm_fsm.balance_out).value + where LogicArrayObject(atm_fsm.balance_out) = HierarchyObject(atm_fsm).balance_out
auth_error was not asserted for insufficient funds assert False

Account was not locked after 3 failed PIN attempts assert 0 == 1 + where 0 = int(Logic('0')) + where Logic('0') = LogicObject(atm_fsm.locked_out).value + where LogicObject(atm_fsm.locked_out) = HierarchyObject(atm_fsm).locked_out
